creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to xialuyu from comment #4)

Unless you want to use ports, all you can do is to do "pkg remove -f ghostscript9" and then install gs10. It will ignore all other dependent ports.
Regarding TL, I have never used it from ports because the are either too much or too outdated. The TL distro smoothly installs into /usr/local/texlive and produces fantastic documents where some have hundreds of pages in Mandarin for us. Give it a try: https://mirror.ctan.org/systems/texlive/tlnet/install-tl-unx.tar.gz
